candidates.description: "Dawid Bąk and Piotr Pszczółkowski are the brewers at Browar Warszawski. What they have in common? Huge experience and passion. They use only the best malts and hops from all over the world to produce their beers. They have brewed beers on an industrial, craft and home brewing scale. It is said that the quality of beer says a lot about the knowledge, experience and reliability of the person who brewed it. Therefore, there is no better showcase for Dawid and Piotr than their beers from @browar_warszawski . #craftbeeroktoberfest #beerfest #munich #craftbeer #microbreweries #microbreweriesrock #beerfestival #bands #streetfood #craftbeerfestival #oktoberfest2023 #beerbandsfood #craftbeerrevolution #festivalvibes #streetfooddelights #beerloversunite #beerlovers #festivalfever #craftbeerparty #cbof2023 #craftbeerpoland #craftbeerbrewery #craftbeerwarsaw | Restaurant Offer | munich

candidates.description: "Sofia Electric Brewing is an innovative, young microbrewery from Sofia, the capital of Bulgaria. The brewing team calls itself: Crazies who like good beer.
